positive: A mystical bioluminescent floral arrangement intertwined with swirling galaxies and nebulae. The design features elegant, highly contrasted silhouettes of exotic flowers (like lotus and lily) and detailed celestial elements (planets, rings, comets). The composition is centralized, using negative space effectively, with deep sapphire blues, ethereal violets, and glowing neon magenta highlights. Style: highly detailed vector illustration combined with ethereal vaporwave aesthetics. Flat design suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Clean lines, dramatic contrast, volumetric lighting from the stars, symmetrical balance, masterpiece quality.
